creator: denny@geekhold.com
text:
Updating /usr/ports/security/tailscale to the current 1.8.3 version. Tested on OPNsense.

root@OPNsense:/usr/ports/security/tailscale # git diff -u --cached
diff --git a/security/tailscale/Makefile b/security/tailscale/Makefile
index 3ce1c943a2c..1ff5630907a 100644
--- a/security/tailscale/Makefile
+++ b/security/tailscale/Makefile
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 PORTNAME=      tailscale
-PORTVERSION=   1.6.0
+PORTVERSION=   1.8.3
 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=     v
 CATEGORIES=    security

diff --git a/security/tailscale/distinfo b/security/tailscale/distinfo
index 6b044d3f7bf..58af686e7f7 100644
--- a/security/tailscale/distinfo
+++ b/security/tailscale/distinfo
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1616662602
-SHA256 (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.6.0/v1.6.0.mod) = 0abd2bf7e4acf0bddcad1e0d9d3b7dc3030923f03715af52a5f29db813c8b6f5
-SIZE (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.6.0/v1.6.0.mod) = 1970
-SHA256 (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.6.0/v1.6.0.zip) = a51f83b6d1bc16a5ea5f5b27d660f068e918bbafff166decaabe0a87befe86c9
-SIZE (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.6.0/v1.6.0.zip) = 771010
+TIMESTAMP = 1620863496
+SHA256 (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.8.3/v1.8.3.mod) = 95419a6ec25c6dab7daab9e7abef61349e18de3dd3118acbb1a6d4084d8ee9ca
+SIZE (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.8.3/v1.8.3.mod) = 2133
+SHA256 (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.8.3/v1.8.3.zip) = 7118b15e2ecbec8804241bf4617cc67e034929a5ed39f01207a63b28407a7fa6
+SIZE (go/security_tailscale/tailscale-v1.8.3/v1.8.3.zip) = 897287
root@OPNsense:/usr/ports/security/tailscale #
